jsonld.name: Pre-Exposure Awareness
jsonld.description: The anticipatory state of holding multiple interpretations in parallel while knowing the upcoming collapse into singular reading will constitute diagnostic disclosure, experiencing interpretive multiplicity as potential-evidence-not-yet-produced.
